task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the correct appointment for Marilynn Corkery scheduled at 10:00 AM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The appointment edit screen or calendar view is open, showing the patient name 'Marilynn Corkery' (or PID 2) and the start time of 10:00 AM.

task_completion.description: Verify the appointment duration is changed to 30 minutes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A duration field shows '30' (minutes) or the end time is adjusted to 10:30 AM, reflecting a 30-minute block.

task_completion.description: Verify the appointment category is set to 'Office Visit'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The category dropdown or selection field clearly displays 'Office Visit'.

task_completion.description: Verify the specific comment was added to the appointment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Extended - patient has additional concerns' is visible in the comments, notes, or description text area.

task_completion.description: Verify the original date and start time were not changed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The start time remains exactly 10:00 AM and the date remains set to tomorrow's date on the final edit or save screen.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's graphical user interface to modify the appointment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the medical scheduling software's web interface, not a terminal, API client, or database console.

integrity.description: The agent actively used the form fields to input data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Dropdowns, text fields, and save buttons within the application are actively being clicked and typed into.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the application by writing the expected output into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no text editors (like Notepad, Vim, Nano) open displaying the task details or expected answers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Marilynn Corkery has PID 2. The appointment start time is 10:00:00. The expected duration is 1800 seconds (30 minutes). The expected category is 'Office Visit'.
